name: Ар-нуво (Муха) — Фрирен
subject: A slender young-looking female elf, Frieren, with very long silver-white twin-tail hair, long pointed ears and calm green eyes, posed as a serene Art-Nouveau decorative figure
moment: Frieren stands full figure, SINGLE FIGURE, one clear frontal view only (no second view, no model-sheet, no alternate angle anywhere on the print), the figure occupying 76% of frame height, her very long silver-white hair gathered into two side-tails that spill well past her waist in soft flowing whiplash curves, long pointed elf ears clearly visible, calm half-lidded light-green eyes and a quietly melancholic expression, wearing a cream-white traveling mage robe with delicate golden trim beneath a charcoal-black high-collared cape and a wide belt, one hand resting lightly on a tall pale wooden staff crowned with a milky crystal orb, her weight in a gentle serene contrapposto; directly behind her head glows a large circular decorative Mucha-style halo disc filled with a pale mosaic of small gilded tiles and softly drifting stylised petals, the whole panel capped at the very top by a graceful curved Art-Nouveau arch, while organic plant tendrils, curling vines and slender blossoming stems rendered in thin gilded outlines wind sinuously down both narrow side margins of the tall vertical panel over a muted pastel ground of dusty rose, cream and soft lavender, every contour drawn in fine delicate golden linework in the fluid feminine manner of Alphonse Mucha, nothing rigid or mirror-symmetrical; ANATOMY: exactly two arms and two legs, correct human anatomy, no extra or duplicated limbs, no second figure or floating alternate pose anywhere in the composition. The full figure is completely unclipped inside the frame with generous even chroma-key margin on all four sides, nothing touching the frame edge.
art_style: Декоративный модерн Альфонса Мухи: высокая узкая композиция с большим круглым нимбом-диском за головой, тонкие золотые контуры и вьющаяся растительная органика (стебли, вьюны, цветы, whiplash-кривые) по краям, пастельно-приглушённая палитра и изящная арка сверху. Женственно, текуче, без жёсткой геометрии и симметрии.
typography: The main phrase "TIME FLOWS ON" appears exactly once, set in a slender flowing Art-Nouveau serif with fine tapered serifs, running in a single centered line across a narrow ornamental tablet at the base of the panel just below the figure's hem, cap-height about 0.10x the figure width with a word gap of 0.05x cap-height so the three words stay clearly separated and never touch, filled in soft antique gold and traced with a hairline of darker gold. The vertical katakana column フリーレン appears exactly once, five glyphs stacked top to bottom (フ・リ・ー・レ・ン), glyph size about 0.06x the figure width, placed outside the figure's silhouette in the right side margin nested among the gilded vines, drawn in thin pale-gold strokes. No other text anywhere on the print.
palette: muted dusty rose, cream white, pale antique gold, silver-white, soft lavender, charcoal black
chroma_note: Фрирен и весь орнамент — в холодных бело-серебристо-золотых и пастельных тонах (роза, крем, лаванда, золото), зелёного нет кроме глаз; вьюны и листва решены золотым контуром, а не зеленью, поэтому зелёный хромакей ничего не съест.

name: Иллюминированный манускрипт — Фрирен

typography: The main phrase "TIME FLOWS ON" appears exactly once, set in a single line along the lower margin of the parchment page just beneath the figure's feet, rendered as ornate medieval blackletter (Gothic textura) capitals filled with burnished gold leaf and outlined in cinnabar red, cap-height approximately 0.10x the figure width with a word gap of 0.05x cap-height so the words stay clearly separated; a vertical column of exactly five katakana glyphs フリーレン runs top-to-bottom in the right-hand margin OUTSIDE the figure's silhouette, tucked within the vine border field, each glyph about 0.06x the figure width in slim cinnabar-red ink like a scribe's marginal note, appearing exactly once. chroma_note: Палитра холодная бело-кремово-золотая с чёрной накидкой и киноварью; лозы, аканты и маргиналии рамки золочёные/киноварные, НЕ зелёные; зелёного массива нет (только глаза), поэтому зелёный хромакей вырежет фон чисто, не задев рамку.

name: Небесный атлас — Фрирен

Всё в технике медной гравюры с тонкой штриховкой, тема вечности и течения времени.
typography: Set the main phrase "TIME FLOWS ON" once, curving along the lower arc of the outer engraved brass ring like an inscription on an astrolabe rim, centered beneath the figure's feet; use an engraved serif capitals face with fine hairline strokes, filled pale antique gold matching the constellation lines, cap-height 0.10x figure width with word gap 0.5x cap-height so the three words stay clearly separated along the curve. Place a single vertical column of exactly 5 katakana glyphs フリーレン reading top to bottom, glyph size ~0.06x figure width, set OUTSIDE the figure silhouette in the open indigo field just inside the left engraved ring border, in the same fine gold engraved tone; it appears exactly once. palette: deep indigo night-blue, antique brass gold, pale crystal white, silver-white, charcoal black, soft cream
chroma_note: Палитра холодная — индиго-ночное небо, латунное золото, серебро и кремовый; зелёного нет кроме глаз Фрирен, поэтому зелёный хромакей вырежет фон чисто.

subject: A slender young-looking female elf, Frieren, with very long silver-white twin-tail hair, long pointed ears and calm green eyes, rendered as a fine white line-drawing on a deep prussian-blue cyanotype ground
moment: Frieren stands full figure, SINGLE FIGURE, one clear frontal view only (no second view, no model-sheet, no alternate angle anywhere on the print), the figure occupying 76% of frame height, drawn entirely in thin luminous white contour lines over a monochrome prussian-blue cyanotype field, her very long silver-white hair falling in two side twin-tails past her waist as pale traced strands, long pointed elf ears clearly visible, calm half-lidded light-green eyes and a quiet melancholic expression, wearing the canonical white-and-cream long mage tunic-robe with fine gold trim rendered as delicate white edge-lines and a dark charcoal high-collared cape drawn in dense cross-hatched blue, a wide belt at the waist, holding a single tall wooden staff topped with a pale crystal orb, standing calm and still in a contemplative pose; around and behind her the entire background is a drafted spell blueprint — large concentric magic circles centered on her chest, ringed bands of thin white runic glyphs, radial dimension lines with tick marks and small arrow annotations pointing to her staff and robe like an engineering diagram, faint fine millimetre graph-grid covering the whole prussian-blue ground, softened by gentle contact-print light bleeds and pale halation blooms at the edges so it reads as a scholarly cyanotype of a spell schematic; ANATOMY: exactly two arms and two legs, correct human anatomy, no extra or duplicated limbs, no second figure or floating alternate pose anywhere in the composition. The full figure is completely unclipped inside the frame with generous even chroma-key margin on all four sides, nothing touching the frame edge.
art_style: Монохромный цианотип / инженерный синий чертёж: только берлинская лазурь и белые линии. Фигура и вся сцена — тонкая начерченная магическая схема (концентрические круги, руны, размерные выноски, миллиметровка) с эффектом контактной печати и лёгкими засветами.
typography: Main slogan "TIME FLOWS ON" appears exactly once, set in a narrow technical drafting-stencil uppercase, thin white hairline strokes matching the blueprint linework, placed as a single horizontal line low in the field just beneath the figure's feet and centered on the lower magic circle, cap-height 0.11x figure width with a word gap of 0.05x cap-height so the words never merge, sitting on a faint white baseline rule with tiny dimension ticks at each end. The secondary line "MAGE OF THE AGES" appears exactly once in much smaller drafting caps (cap-height about 0.05x figure width) directly under the main slogan as an annotation caption. A vertical column of exactly five katakana glyphs フリーレン appears exactly once, each glyph about 0.06x figure width, drawn in thin white line to match the schematic, stacked top-to-bottom in the upper-left margin of the blueprint OUTSIDE the figure silhouette. No other text anywhere on the print.
palette: prussian blue, cyanotype indigo, chalk white, pale sky-blue halation, faint steel-grey
chroma_note: Вся сцена в холодных сине-белых тонах цианотипа, зелёного массива нет (только глаза), поэтому зелёный хромакей вырежет чисто.

name: Dark academia — фронтиспис книги — Фрирен
subject: A slender young-looking female elf, Frieren, with very long silver-white twin-tail hair, long pointed ears and calm green eyes, rendered as the engraved author-portrait of an antique scholarly volume
moment: Frieren stands full figure, SINGLE FIGURE, one clear frontal view only (no second view, no model-sheet, no alternate angle anywhere on the print), the figure occupying 76% of frame height, her very long silver-white hair drawn into two side-tails that fall well below her waist and her long pointed elf ears clearly visible, calm light-green eyes half-lowered under a quiet, faintly melancholic expression, wearing the canonical traveller-mage costume of a long cream-white robe-tunic with fine gold trim beneath a dark charcoal-black high-collared caped mantle cinched by a broad belt, one hand resting on a tall wooden staff crowned with a pale crystal orb (the single canonical attribute in frame), her pose still and contemplative as if pausing on a long road; the whole figure is set within a vertical oval engraved medallion-vignette at the exact centre of an antique title-page spread, the oval rimmed by a delicately hatched pen-and-ink border and framed by symmetrical decorative flourish-vignettes and thin curling scrollwork radiating into the corners, a ruled title block of fine engraved rules sitting below the medallion like the frontispiece of an old book, everything printed in muted sepia and ink lines on warm cream laid paper with faint plate-mark shadowing, the atmosphere scholarly and hushed like a library rather than gothic horror; ANATOMY: exactly two arms and two legs, correct human anatomy, no extra or duplicated limbs, no second figure or floating alternate pose anywhere in the composition. The full figure is completely unclipped inside the frame with generous even chroma-key margin on all four sides, nothing touching the frame edge.
art_style: Гравюрный фронтиспис старинного учёного издания (dark academia): фигура в овальном медальоне-виньетке по центру титульного листа, вокруг — тонкая перьевая штриховка, декоративные завитки и разлинованный титульный блок; приглушённая сепия и чернила на кремовой бумаге, сдержанная библиотечная элегантность без готического ужаса.
typography: Set the main phrase "TIME FLOWS ON" once, centred in the ruled title block directly below the oval medallion, in an engraved high-contrast serif with fine hairline strokes and a slight letterpress bite, cap-height about 0.11x figure width and word gap about 0.5x cap-height so the three words stay clearly separated, filled in the deep sepia-ink tone of the plate. Below it, on its own engraved rule, place the secondary line "Beyond Journey's End" once in a smaller italic engraver's serif, cap-height about 0.05x figure width, same sepia ink. Each of these texts appears exactly once. Run the katakana column フリーレン (exactly five glyphs) vertically down the outer decorative border to one side, OUTSIDE the figure's silhouette, within the frame margin, glyph size about 0.06x figure width in delicate hairline ink; it appears exactly once. No other text anywhere on the print.
palette: warm cream laid paper, muted sepia, deep ink brown-black, faded gold trim, soft charcoal-grey, pale silver-white
chroma_note: Палитра целиком тёплая (сепия, чернила, кремовая бумага, золото, серебро) — заметного зелёного в композиции нет, только глаза; зелёный хромакей безопасен и не съест ничего важного.
